dashboard_meta.architecture: Layer 1 agents are sealed independent raw signal producers. No cross-agent communication.

agents.summary: USD Layer 1 raw call generated from sealed independent workflow.

24h.reason: USD shows a bullish lean as rising US 2-year yields signal hawkish expectations, but DXY momentum is negative and the VIX indicates risk-on conditions which usually weigh against USD strength. Multiple key inputs are missing, reducing confidence. Primary drivers show some conflict, limiting conviction to a lean bullish bias.
